description_long: This coupe car features a striking blue and orange color scheme with a sleek, aerodynamic body and an open cockpit. The vehicle is equipped with large, exposed wheels and a prominent engine mounted at the front, complete with visible exhaust pipes and mechanical detailing. The rear of the car showcases a unique jet-like propulsion system, suggesting a high-performance or futuristic design. The interior includes two bucket seats, a steering wheel, and a dashboard with visible controls, all protected by a low, wraparound windshield. The doors are minimalistic, and the car's overall silhouette is low and sporty, emphasizing speed and agility. The combination of metallic, plastic, and glass materials gives the car a modern, high-tech appearance.
description: A sporty blue and orange coupe car with an open cockpit, exposed engine, and jet-inspired rear propulsion system. The design is futuristic, with large wheels and a sleek, aerodynamic body.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the open cockpit, exposed engine, and jet-like rear propulsion system.
description_view_1: Front view showing the wide stance, prominent engine, and detailed dashboard behind the windshield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the aerodynamic body, visible interior, and rear propulsion details.
description_view_3: Angled front view focusing on the engine, front wheels, and the car's low, aggressive profile.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
